2603.16459.title: DynHD: Hallucination Detection for Diffusion Large Language Models via Denoising Dynamics Deviation Learning
2603.16459.paper_summary: Diffusion large language models (D-LLMs) have emerged as a promising alternative to auto-regressive models due to their iterative refinement capabilities. However, hallucinations remain a critical issue that hinders their reliability. To detect hallucination responses from model outputs, token-level uncertainty (e.g., entropy) has been widely used as an effective signal to indicate potential factual errors. Nevertheless, the fixed-length generation paradigm of D-LLMs implies that tokens contribute unevenly to hallucination detection, with only a small subset providing meaningful signals. Moreover, the evolution trend of uncertainty throughout the diffusion process can also provide important signals, highlighting the necessity of modeling its denoising dynamics for hallucination detection. In this paper, we propose DynHD that bridge these gaps from both spatial (token sequence) and temporal (denoising dynamics) perspectives. To address the information density imbalance across tokens, we propose a semantic-aware evidence construction module that extracts hallucination-indicative signals by filtering out non-informative tokens and emphasizing semantically meaningful ones. To model denoising dynamics for hallucination detection, we introduce a reference evidence generator that learns the expected evolution trajectory of uncertainty evidence, along with a deviation-based hallucination detector that makes predictions by measuring the discrepancy between the observed and reference trajectories. Extensive experiments demonstrate that DynHD consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines while achieving higher efficiency across multiple benchmarks and backbone models.
2603.16459.paper_summary_zh: 擴散大型語言模型（D-LLMs）因其迭代精煉能力而成為自回歸模型的有前景的替代方案。然而，幻覺仍然是一個關鍵問題，妨礙了它們的可靠性。為了從模型輸出中檢測幻覺反應，令牌級的不確定性（例如，熵）已被廣泛用作指示潛在事實錯誤的有效信號。然而，D-LLMs的固定長度生成範式意味著令牌對幻覺檢測的貢獻不均，只有一小部分提供有意義的信號。此外，在擴散過程中不確定性的演變趨勢也能提供重要信號，突顯了建模其去噪動態以進行幻覺檢測的必要性。在本文中，我們提出了DynHD，從空間（令牌序列）和時間（去噪動態）兩個角度彌補這些空白。為了解決令牌間信息密度不平衡的問題，我們提出了一個語義感知的證據構建模塊，通過過濾掉非信息性令牌並強調語義上有意義的令牌來提取指示幻覺的信號。為了建模去噪動態以進行幻覺檢測，我們引入了一個參考證據生成器，該生成器學習不確定性證據的預期演變軌跡，並結合一個基於偏差的幻覺檢測器，通過測量觀察到的軌跡與參考軌跡之間的差異來進行預測。大量實驗表明，DynHD在多個基準和骨幹模型上始終超越最先進的基線，同時在效率上也取得了更高的成就。
2603.16459.author: Yanyu Qian et.al.
2603.16459.authors: Yanyu Qian, Yue Tan, Yixin Liu, Wang Yu, Shirui Pan
